name: Kre.Ka. S.A.
summary: Kre.Ka. S.A. engages in breeding, slaughtering, producing, and selling meat products primarily in Greece. The company offers various types of fresh and frozen meat products, including cattle, pork, lamb, sheep and goat, poultry, and beef products; and gyros, skewers, hamburgers, stewed meatballs, kokoretsi, and kebabs. It also provides fresh and frozen products based on meat, such as smoked products, sausages, and parizaki. In addition, the company is involved in the production of biogas, electric and thermal energy, and organic fertilizers; and provision of environmental management services of solid and liquid waste. It also exports its products. The company is headquartered in Kavala, Greece.
